brief:
# POLYMARKET FRIDAY BRIEF | April 24, 2026

## Headline
**MegaETH Token Launch Explodes to 93%; Iran Peace Hopes Crater as Ceasefire Window Slams Shut**

---

## The Signal

The market just repriced two competing narratives hard. MegaETH's token launch probability rocketed 86% in 24 hours—now sitting at 93% with nearly $1M in volume. This isn't noise. Six days remain and smart money is either seeing internal signals or pricing in the inevitability of a launch announcement. Watch for insider accumulation if this breaks 95%.

The geopolitical flip is sharper: Iran ceasefire extended by April 22 (yesterday's deadline) crashed from viable to 1%—a -13.4% hammering on $4.9M volume. The market is saying: *that window closed*. Interestingly, the broader "conflict ends by May 15" still sits at 99%, suggesting traders expect de-escalation later, not continuation of tensions. This is rational hedging: near-term ceasefire dead, but longer-dated peace still priced in. Smart money isn't betting on escalation—they're betting on time.

Musk's tweet count hitting 180-199 (April 17-24) at 43% is suspicious. Up 36.5% means accumulation is happening. Either he's been quiet (easy to verify) or this was mispriced at the lows. Worth a sanity check against actual tweet counts.

---

## Watch List

**1. US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 30 (6%, $2.0M vol)**  
This is the real tell. If ceasefire is dead but this stays at 6%, traders don't fear escalation—they think negotiated settlement is still possible before month-end. Monitor for any news on back-channel talks. A pop to 15%+ signals serious diplomatic movement.

**2. MegaETH token launch (93%, $912K vol)**  
Approaching saturation. The risk/reward flips once this hits 95%+. If it breaks to 98-99%, you're catching a falling knife on any short. Watch for announcement timing—if delayed past April 28, expect 10-15% sell-off.

**3. Israel x Hezbollah ceasefire extended by April 26 (64%, +13%)**  
This one's outperforming. Only two days to deadline. High volume, rising odds = market confidence in extension. If this holds above 60% into Saturday, it signals broader regional stability narrative is winning.

---

**Trade smart. Verify the MegaETH rumors. Iran's window closed—now it's about whether negotiations resume.**
